A stream-of-consciousness explanation might go like this: I am sitting at home with my cute dog. I have a wallet in my pocket. I need to know how much money I have. I open my wallet and see a few bills. I count them and find that I have 250 dollars. I feel happy because I have enough money for my needs. I think about what I need to buy and how I will use the money. I am satisfied with the amount I have.
